title: Shaheed Ashfaq Ullah Khan Prani Udyan

overview.short: Shaheed Ashfaq Ullah Khan Zoological Park or Gorakhpur Zoological Garden commonly known as Gorakhpur Zoo is in Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Shaheed Ashfaq Ullah Khan Zoological Park or Gorakhpur Zoological Garden commonly known as Gorakhpur Zoo is in Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is named after independence activist Ashfaqulla Khan. With an area of 121 acres, it is the second biggest zoo in the state after Kanpur Zoological Park. It was opened for public on 27 March 2021.

topPlaces.name: Ramgarh Tal Lake
topPlaces.description: Ramgarh Tal is a lake located in Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, India. In 1970, at its largest size, the lake covered an area of 723 hectares (1,790 acres) with a circumference of 18 kilometres (11 mi).

topPlaces.name: Vir Bahadur Singh Planetarium, Gorakhpur
topPlaces.description: Vir Bahadur Singh Planetarium (also spelled 'Veer' or 'Bir') is a tourist attraction in Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, India. It has been run by the Council of Science & Technology, Uttar Pradesh since 21 December 2009.

topPlaces.name: Syed Modi Railway Stadium
topPlaces.description: Syed Modi Railway Stadium is a cricket stadium in Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, India. The ground has hosted two Ranji matches when home team Railways cricket team played against Vidarbha cricket team in 1982.

topPlaces.name: Gorakhpur
topPlaces.description: Gorakhpur (Bhojpuri pronunciation: [ɡoˈɾəkʰ.pʊɾ]) is a city in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh, along the banks of the Rapti river in the Purvanchal region. It is situated 272 kilometres east of the state capital, Lucknow.

topPlaces.name: Gorakhpur division
topPlaces.description: Gorakhpur division is one of the 18 administrative geographical units (i.e. division) of the northern Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Bhauwapar
topPlaces.description: Bhauwapar is a village in the Gorakhpur district, Uttar Pradesh in India, near the border with Nepal. It is situated 15 km (9.3 mi) from Gorakhpur city.

topPlaces.name: St. John's Church, Gorakhpur
topPlaces.description: St. John's Church, Gorakhpur is a Protestant church located in the Basharatpur region of Gorakhpur district, Uttar Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Rohni River
topPlaces.description: The Rohni (also known as Rohini or Rohin) is a river which rises in the Chure or Sivalik Hills in Kapilvastu and Rupandehi Districts of Nepal's Lumbini Zone and flows south into Uttar Pradesh state, India. At Gorakhpur it becomes a left bank tributary of West Rapti River, which in turn joins the Ghaghara above Gaura Barhaj, then Ghaghara in turn joins the Ganges.

Gorakhpur division is one of the 18 administrative geographical units (i.e. division) of the northern Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

itinerary.title: Day 3 — St. John's Church, Gorakhpur & around

items.note: St. John's Church, Gorakhpur is a Protestant church located in the Basharatpur region of Gorakhpur district, Uttar Pradesh, India.

The Rohni (also known as Rohini or Rohin) is a river which rises in the Chure or Sivalik Hills in Kapilvastu and Rupandehi Districts of Nepal's Lumbini Zone and flows south into Uttar Pradesh state, India. At Gorakhpur it becomes a left bank tributary of West Rapti River, which in turn joins the Ghaghara above Gaura Barhaj, then Ghaghara in turn joins the Ganges.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shaheed Ashfaq Ullah Khan Prani Udyan?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shaheed Ashfaq Ullah Khan Prani Udyan is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shaheed Ashfaq Ullah Khan Prani Udyan?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lal Bahadur Shastri Airport, Varanasi (151 km) and the nearest railway station is Gorakhpur Junction (6 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shaheed Ashfaq Ullah Khan Prani Udyan?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shaheed Ashfaq Ullah Khan Prani Udyan at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shaheed Ashfaq Ullah Khan Prani Udyan?
faq.a: Stays in Shaheed Ashfaq Ullah Khan Prani Udyan start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shaheed Ashfaq Ullah Khan Prani Udyan?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ramgarh Tal Lake, Vir Bahadur Singh Planetarium, Gorakhpur, Syed Modi Railway Stadium, Gorakhpur, Gorakhpur division.
